Settings.SQL:
SELECT
 'H1' LINE_ID,
 XX.SB_ID,
 XX.PD_ID,
 XX.LOT_ID,
 DD.OP_ID,
 DD.STEP_ID,
 CC.WP_ID,
 DECODE(CC.RECIPE_ID, '枚葉レシピ', EE.RECIPE_ID, CC.RECIPE_ID) AS RECIPE_ID,
 CC.LOT_RECIPE_FLAG,
 DECODE(CC.LOT_RECIPE_FLAG, 0, EE.WF_RECIPE_PROC_QUANTITY, CC.WF_GOOD_QUANTITY) AS WF_PROC_QUANTITY,
 DECODE(CC.LOT_RECIPE_FLAG, 0, EE.CHIP_RECIPE_PROC_QUANTITY, CC.CHIP_GOOD_QUANTITY) AS CHIP_PROC_QUANTITY,
 XX.FLOW_CLASS,
 XX.LOT_FLOW_TYPE,
 AA.ENTRY_TIME AS WORK_START,
 BB.ENTRY_TIME AS PROC_START,
 CC.ENTRY_TIME AS PROC_END,
 DD.ENTRY_TIME AS WORK_END,
 ROUND((DD.ENTRY_TIME - AA.ENTRY_TIME) * (24*60), 2) AS WORK_TIME_MIN,
 ROUND((CC.ENTRY_TIME - BB.ENTRY_TIME) * (24*60), 2) AS PROC_TIME_MIN,
 AA.EMP_ID AS WORK_STRAT_EMP_ID,
 DD.EMP_ID AS WORK_END_EMP_ID,
 CASE
  WHEN AA.EMP_ID = '9999995' AND DD.EMP_ID = '9999995' THEN 1
  ELSE 0
 END AS AUTO_WORK_FLAG,
 BB.EMP_ID AS PROC_STRAT_EMP_ID,
 CC.EMP_ID AS PROC_END_EMP_ID, 
 CASE
  WHEN BB.EMP_ID = '9999996' AND CC.EMP_ID = '9999996' THEN 1
  ELSE 0
 END AS AUTO_PROC_FLAG,
 TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_TIME
FROM
 LOT XX,
 (
 SELECT
  *
 FROM
  LOT_EVENT_HISTORY
 WHERE
  LOT_EVENT_ID =3
 ) AA,
 (
 SELECT
  *
 FROM
  LOT_EVENT_HISTORY
 WHERE
  LOT_EVENT_ID =4
 ) BB,
 (
 SELECT
  *
 FROM
  LOT_EVENT_HISTORY
 WHERE
  LOT_EVENT_ID =5
 ) CC,
 (
 SELECT
  *
 FROM
  LOT_EVENT_HISTORY
 WHERE
  LOT_EVENT_ID =6
 ) DD,
 (
 SELECT
  SB_ID, 
  LOT_ID, 
  OP_ID, 
  STEP_ID, 
  WP_ID, 
  RECIPE_ID,
  SUM(CHIP_QUANTITY) CHIP_RECIPE_PROC_QUANTITY,
  COUNT(*) AS WF_RECIPE_PROC_QUANTITY
 FROM
  WF_HISTORY
 WHERE
  LOT_EVENT_ID = 5
 GROUP BY
  SB_ID, LOT_ID, OP_ID, STEP_ID, WP_ID, RECIPE_ID
 ) EE
WHERE
 XX.SB_ID = '1A0'
AND DD.SB_ID = XX.SB_ID
AND DD.LOT_ID = XX.LOT_ID
AND DD.ENTRY_TIME >= TO_DATE(:{start_date},'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND DD.ENTRY_TIME < TO_DATE(:{end_date},'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND AA.SB_ID = DD.SB_ID
AND AA.LOT_ID = DD.LOT_ID
AND AA.OP_ID = DD.OP_ID
AND AA.STEP_ID = DD.STEP_ID
AND BB.SB_ID = DD.SB_ID
AND BB.LOT_ID = DD.LOT_ID
AND BB.OP_ID = DD.OP_ID
AND BB.STEP_ID = DD.STEP_ID
AND CC.SB_ID = DD.SB_ID
AND CC.LOT_ID = DD.LOT_ID
AND CC.OP_ID = DD.OP_ID
AND CC.STEP_ID = DD.STEP_ID
AND EE.SB_ID (+)= DD.SB_ID
AND EE.LOT_ID (+)= DD.LOT_ID
AND EE.OP_ID (+)= DD.OP_ID
AND EE.STEP_ID (+)= DD.STEP_ID
AND EE.WP_ID (+)= DD.WP_ID
ORDER BY
 SB_ID, LOT_ID, WORK_END
